site.title: Work Summary Dashboard
site.footer: © 2026 Microsoft Work Summary • Built for quarterly and annual review

overview.title: Build → Win → Scale Mission
overview.description: What I have built is not a series of short-term wins, but a sustainable partner growth engine for AI and Data. This engine integrates strategic focus, conversion mechanisms, solution standardization, and ecosystem expansion into a cohesive system, validated by measurable pipeline, consumption, and revenue outcomes. Ultimately, my core contribution lies in enabling partners to succeed and, through their success, driving scalable and sustained growth while amplifying Microsoft's value across the ecosystem.

pmx.title: PMX project detail
pmx.intro: The embedded workbook below keeps the attached PMX export inside the dashboard, so the source detail stays one click away from the summary.

projects.name: Workbook-wide PMX view
projects.description: The export spans 81 projects and keeps the status model clean enough to track delivery health directly from the data.

projects.name: Embedded source workbook
projects.description: The attached HTML workbook is embedded on the page, so the full PMX detail remains inside the dashboard.

projects.name: Structured delivery signals
projects.description: Project data is normalized into counts, status buckets, and representative highlights that can be reused in reviews.

pmx.detailDescription: The iframe below loads the copied PMX export and keeps the source detail in the dashboard.
pmx.detailNote: The workbook is stored as pmx-workbook.html in the site root.

solutionBuild.title: Solution Build summary
solutionBuild.intro: The workbook splits into 52 partner-innovation projects and 29 service-group projects, which gives us a clean lens on the solution-build side of the portfolio.

projects.name: Build on ASP and Azure migration
projects.description: Includes infra and database migration, SAP on Azure, and AI platform work that turns migration patterns into repeatable assets.

projects.name: DB Insight Platform
projects.description: The workbook shows completed win cases such as Hayco, YFY Jupiter, and Artiso Education, all tied to the same solution pattern.

projects.name: KnowledgeWiz and internal RAG
projects.description: The internal RAG bot work captures 40K USD annual cases and shows how AI enablement can be packaged into a repeatable solution.

solutionBuild.note: Visible annualized win cases in the workbook add up to at least $1.51M.

activities.title: Partner enablement and activities
activities.intro: I extracted 34 event-like projects from the workbook, including workshops, bootcamps, solution days, and technical briefings.

items.name: Microsoft Solution Day and partner activation
items.description: The workbook includes co-hosted solution days, partner activation events, and enablement activities with HSBC, Lenovo, and other ecosystem partners.

items.name: GitHub Copilot workshop series
items.description: The export captures hands-on workshops and training sessions that moved partner conversations from awareness to practical usage.

items.name: Azure enablement bootcamp
items.description: Bootcamp-style sessions and technical briefings helped translate solution design into concrete pipeline opportunities.

next.title: What I will improve next
projectItems: Turn PMX workbook signals into a cleaner delivery health model
Add automated retrospective templates so reviews take less time to assemble
Track the solution-build metrics monthly instead of only at review time
orgItems: Build a reusable knowledge map across programs and activities
Shift activity reporting from attendance to conversion and impact
Use AI tooling to reduce status-reporting overhead

site.title: 工作总结看板
site.footer: © 2026 Microsoft 工作总结 • 适用于季度与年度回顾

overview.title: Build → Win → Scale 使命
overview.description: 我所构建的不是一系列短期胜利，而是 AI 和数据领域的可持续伙伴成长引擎。这个引擎集成了战略聚焦、转化机制、方案标准化和生态拓展，形成了一个有机整体，并由可衡量的 pipeline、消耗和营收成果验证。最终，我的核心贡献在于使伙伴成功，通过他们的成功驱动可扩展和可持续的增长，同时放大 Microsoft 在整个生态中的价值。

pmx.title: PMX 项目详情
pmx.intro: 下方嵌入了附件里的 PMX HTML 导出，方便直接查看原始明细。

projects.name: 工作簿级 PMX 视图
projects.description: 导出里包含 81 个项目，状态模型足够干净，可以直接作为交付健康度的依据。

projects.name: 嵌入式原始工作簿
projects.description: 附件里的 HTML 工作簿已经嵌入页面，汇总看板和原始明细之间可以无缝切换。

projects.name: 结构化交付信号
projects.description: 项目数据已经被整理为总量、状态桶和代表性高亮，便于复盘和汇报复用。

solutionBuild.title: Solution Build 总结
solutionBuild.intro: 工作簿可以拆分成 52 个伙伴创新项目和 29 个服务组项目，这样可以更清晰地看出 solution-build 侧的成果。

projects.name: Build on ASP 与 Azure 迁移
projects.description: 包含基础设施和数据库迁移、SAP on Azure 以及 AI 平台工作，把迁移模式沉淀成可复用资产。

projects.name: DB Insight Platform
projects.description: 工作簿里能看到 Hayco、YFY Jupiter 和 Artiso Education 等已完成 win case，全部归在同一方案模式下。

projects.name: KnowledgeWiz 与内部 RAG
projects.description: 内部 RAG Bot 的内容里记录了 40K USD 年化案例，说明 AI 赋能可以沉淀成可复用解决方案。

solutionBuild.note: 工作簿里可见的年度化 win case 加总至少达到 $1.51M。

activities.title: 伙伴赋能与组织活动
activities.intro: 我从工作簿里提取了 34 个活动型项目，包括 workshop、bootcamp、solution day 和技术 briefing。

metrics.label: 高亮 win case 示例

items.name: Microsoft Solution Day 与伙伴激活
items.description: 工作簿里包含与 HSBC、Lenovo 等伙伴联合举办的 solution day、partner activation 和 enablement 活动。
items.role: 角色：组织者 / 联合主办

items.name: GitHub Copilot workshop 系列
items.description: 导出文件记录了多场 hands-on workshop 和 training，把伙伴沟通从认知推进到实际使用。

items.name: Azure enablement bootcamp
items.description: Bootcamp 和技术 briefing 帮助把方案设计转化为可跟进的 pipeline 机会。
items.role: 角色：策划 / 技术支持

next.title: 下一阶段要继续提升的方向
projectItems: 把 PMX 工作簿信号转成更清晰的交付健康度模型
加入自动化复盘模板，减少整理汇报材料的时间
把 Solution Build 指标改成按月追踪，而不是只在复盘时看一次
orgItems: 沉淀可复用的跨项目知识地图
让活动汇报从参与人数转向转化率与业务影响
用 AI 工具减少状态汇报的重复劳动

site.title: 工作總結看板
site.footer: © 2026 Microsoft 工作總結 • 適用於季度與年度回顧

overview.title: Build → Win → Scale 使命
overview.description: 我所構建的不是一系列短期勝利，而是 AI 和數據領域的可持續夥伴成長引擎。這個引擎集成了戰略聚焦、轉化機制、方案標準化和生態拓展，形成了一個有機整體，並由可衡量的 pipeline、消耗和營收成果驗證。最終，我的核心貢獻在於使夥伴成功，通過他們的成功驅動可擴展和可持續的增長，同時放大 Microsoft 在整個生態中的價值。
